# Privacy Policy

Cathay Award Flight Finder does not collect, sell, or share personal data.

The extension runs only on supported Cathay Pacific booking pages. It stores route search preferences such as origin, destination, departure date, passenger count, and language locally in the user's browser so the form can remember recent inputs.

The extension reads page data needed to display award flight search tools and sends requests only to Cathay Pacific domains that are required for the user-requested search workflow.

No analytics, tracking pixels, remote logging, or third-party advertising services are included.
